leadText: The Ancient Tomb (Japanese: 古代塚 Ancient Tomb) is a location in Hoenn on Route 120. Registeel resides in the innermost chamber.

sections.title: In the games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the games 1.1 Geography 1.2 Puzzle 1.3 Special encounters 1.3.1 Generation III 1.3.2 Generation VI 1.4 Layout 1.5 Music In the games [ edit | edit source ] Geography [ edit | edit source ] On Route 120 , to the southwest, is a flight of stairs that lead up to the Ancient Tomb. The Ancient Tomb is a large rock with a small opening that leads into the inside of tomb, along with Registeel . There are six stone pillars surrounding the tomb, three on each side. Puzzle [ edit | edit source ] To get to Registeel, the Sealed Chamber 's puzzle must be completed. Afterward, the ruins can be accessed. In Pokémon Ruby and Sapphire , the player must use Fly in the middle of the room to open the door inside. The Braille reads: " With new time, hope and love, aim to the sky in the middle. " In Pokémon Emerald , the player must use Flash in the middle of the room. The Braille reads: " Those who inherit our will, shine in the middle. " In Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire , the player must use Fly in the middle of the room. The Braille reads: " Stand center. Aim to the sky with love and hope and time. " Special encounters [ edit | edit source ] Generation III [ edit | edit source ] A Registeel appears in the back of the cave after solving the Braille puzzle. In Emerald, if run from, it respawns upon leaving the area. .mw-parser-output .PKMNcontainer{margin:5px}.mw-parser-output .PKMNcaption{box-sizing:border-box;width:316px;padding:5px 0 2px If defeated or run from, it respawns after entering the Hall of Fame . sections.title: Geography
sections.text: Geography [ edit | edit source ] On Route 120 , to the southwest, is a flight of stairs that lead up to the Ancient Tomb. The Ancient Tomb is a large rock with a small opening that leads into the inside of tomb, along with Registeel . There are six stone pillars surrounding the tomb, three on each side.
